items.title: Support RAJA and Scientific Applications on RVV Architectures
items.summary: The post Support RAJA and Scientific Applications on RVV Architectures appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: RISC-V International探讨在RVV架构上支持RAJA与科学计算应用
items.summary_zh: RISC-V International发布文章，介绍如何在RISC-V向量扩展（RVV）架构上支持RAJA性能可移植库及相关科学计算应用，推动RISC-V在HPC领域生态发展。
items.why_it_matters_zh: RAJA对RVV的支持有助于丰富RISC-V高性能计算软件栈，吸引更多科学计算应用迁移至RISC-V平台。

items.title: RISC-V Edge Inference for Real-Time Eye-Movement Control on GAPses Smart Glasses
items.summary: The post RISC-V Edge Inference for Real-Time Eye-Movement Control on GAPses Smart Glasses appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: GAPses智能眼镜采用RISC-V边缘推理实现实时眼动控制
items.summary_zh: 基于RISC-V的边缘推理方案被用于GAPses智能眼镜，实现对眼球运动的实时控制，展示了RISC-V在低延迟可穿戴设备中的落地能力。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 该案例凸显RISC-V在边缘AI与可穿戴实时控制场景的潜力，为低功耗端侧推理提供参考。

items.title: Behind The Scenes of SHD Group’s 2026 RISC-V Market Forecast
items.summary: The post Behind The Scenes of SHD Group’s 2026 RISC-V Market Forecast appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: SHD Group 2026年RISC-V市场预测幕后解析
items.summary_zh: SHD Group发布2026年RISC-V市场预测，本文深入幕后，介绍其预测方法、数据来源及核心结论，为业界了解RISC-V生态发展趋势提供参考。
items.why_it_matters_zh: SHD Group的预测是RISC-V行业重要风向标，有助于企业和投资者把握生态发展机遇。

items.title: Call for Candidates: Help Us Build a Board That Represents Our Entire Ecosystem
items.summary: Voting is now open for RISC-V International's Board of Directors. Learn how to nominate, understand board member responsibilities, and discover key election dates. The post Call for Candidates: Help Us Build a Board That Represents Our Entire Ecosystem appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: RISC-V International董事会候选人征集启动
items.summary_zh: RISC-V International启动董事会候选人提名程序，呼吁生态成员参与，共同组建代表整个生态的领导团队。本文介绍提名方式、董事职责及关键选举日期。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 董事会决策将影响RISC-V International的战略走向，候选人构成关系到生态系统各方的利益平衡。

items.title: Using a Performance Model to Implement a Superscalar CVA6
items.summary: The post Using a Performance Model to Implement a Superscalar CVA6 appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: 使用性能模型实现超标量CVA6
items.summary_zh: RISC-V International发布技术文章，介绍如何利用性能模型实现超标量版本的CVA6处理器核心。CVA6是开源RISC-V CPU，该工作通过性能建模方法探索超标量微架构的设计与实现路径。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 展示了用性能建模驱动超标量微架构设计的方法论，为CVA6向更高性能演进提供可行路径。

items.title: Production-Ready, Automotive-Grade, AI-Native: RISC-V at Embedded World 2026
items.summary: Ahead of Embedded World, we explore what our members and co-exhibitors will showcase in Nuremberg, the common threads linking their work, and what this reveals about the embedded landscape in 2026. The post Production-Ready, Automotive-Grade, AI-Native: RISC-V at Embedded World 2026 appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: RISC-V亮相Embedded World 2026：聚焦量产、汽车级与AI原生
items.summary_zh: Embedded World 2026开幕前夕，RISC-V International介绍成员及联合参展商将在纽伦堡展示的内容，围绕可量产、汽车级与AI原生三大主题，展现RISC-V在2026年嵌入式领域的生态布局。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 体现RISC-V生态在汽车电子和AI两大高增长领域的成熟度与商业落地能力。

items.title: RISC-V Mentorship Taught Me the RISC-V ISA Is Far More Than a Reference Manual
items.summary: Developer and RISC-V Mentee Animesh Agarwal talks us through what he learned during his time on placement at Ventana Micro, and how it changed how he thinks about ISAs and toolchains. The post RISC-V Mentorship Taught Me the RISC-V ISA Is Far More Than a Reference Manual appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: RISC-V 导师计划：ISA 远不止一份参考手册
items.summary_zh: 开发者 Animesh Agarwal 分享其在 Ventana Micro 实习期间参与 RISC-V 导师项目的经历，介绍他对指令集架构（ISA）和工具链的全新认识，揭示 ISA 设计背后的工程考量远超参考手册的范畴。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 实战视角揭示 ISA 与工具链的深度内涵，为开发者理解 RISC-V 生态提供宝贵参考。

items.title: Start Porting Software To RISC-V Today With Our New, Free Online Course
items.summary: Porting Software to RISC-V (LFD114) is our free course for experienced engineers who need to move performance-critical software to RISC-V. The post Start Porting Software To RISC-V Today With Our New, Free Online Course appeared first on RISC-V International .
items.title_zh: RISC-V International 推出免费在线课程：手把手教你移植软件到 RISC-V
items.summary_zh: RISC-V International 发布免费在线课程《Porting Software to RISC-V》（课程编号 LFD114），面向需要将性能关键型软件迁移到 RISC-V 平台的经验工程师，帮助其快速掌握跨架构移植技能。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 官方免费课程降低软件移植门槛，加速 RISC-V 生态软件适配进程。

items.title: Icy Electronics nRF54L15 Discovery devboard integrates a snappable nRF52820 CMSIS-DAP debugger
items.summary: The nRF54L15 Discovery is a compact wireless devboard with an onboard nRF52820 CMSIS-DAP debugger/programmer for Bluetooth LE, Thread, Zigbee, Matter, NFC, and other 2.4 GHz IoT applications. Its snap-apart design allows the target and interface MCUs to be used as two standalone boards. In the past, we have written about various development boards based on the Nordic nRF54L series, including the Seeed Studio XIAO nRF54L15, XIAO nRF54LM20A (Sense), and the nRF54L15 Connect Kit. The nRF54L15 Discovery board further integrates a snappable nRF52820 CMSIS-DAP debugger/programmer section. It also includes an nPM1300 PMIC with 32–800 mA LiPo battery charging and USB-C PD support, along with a TPS63900 buck-boost converter configurable for 1.8V or 3.3V I/O operation. nRF54L15 Discovery specifications: Wireless MCU – Nordic Semi nRF54L15 wireless SoC CPU Arm Cortex-M33 @ up to 128 MHz RISC-V coprocessor for “software-defined peripheral” Memory – 256 KB SRAM Storage – 1.5MB Non-volatile Memory (NVM) Wireless Bluetooth [...] The post Icy Electronics nRF54L15 Discovery devboard integrates a snappable nRF52820 CMSIS-DAP debugger appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

It also includes an nPM1300 PMIC with 32–800 mA LiPo battery charging and USB-C PD support, along with a TPS63900 buck-boost converter configurable for 1.8V or 3.3V I/O operation. nRF54L15 Discovery specifications: Wireless MCU – Nordic Semi nRF54L15 wireless SoC CPU Arm Cortex-M33 @ up to 128 MHz RISC-V coprocessor for “software-defined peripheral” Memory – 256 KB SRAM Storage – 1.5MB Non-volatile Memory (NVM) Wireless Bluetooth [...] The post Icy Electronics nRF54L15 Discovery devboard integrates a snappable nRF52820 CMSIS-DAP debugger appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

items.title: $99 Xteink X4 Pro 4.3-inch touchscreen eReader to support CrossPoint Reader open-source firmware
items.summary: Xteink X4 Pro is a pocket-sized eReader with a 4.3-inch touchscreen E Ink display, a 16GB microSD card, 2.4 GHz WiFi and Bluetooth wireless connectivity, and a 1100 mAh battery. Previous models like the X3 and X4 e-readers were based on the ESP32-C3 RISC-V microcontroller, but the company has not disclosed which MCU was used in the new X4 Pro model. However, a recent comment on GitHub points to the X4 Pro featuring a more powerful ESP32-S3 microcontroller. Xteink X4 Pro specifications: SoC – ESP32-S3 microcontroller (TBC) with 2.4 GHz WiFi 4 and Bluetooth wireless connectivity Storage – 16 GB microSD card; expandable up to 256 GB Display 4.3-inch touchscreen E Ink display; 219 PPI Dual-tone front light Supported Formats (with default firmware) Document: EPUB, TXT Image: JPG, BMP Fonts: BIN, XTF Misc Home touch button Power, Reset, Previous, and Next buttons Built-in magnets for connection to the back of [...] The post $99 Xteink X4 Pro 4.3-inch touchscreen eReader to support CrossPoint Reader open-source firmware appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: Xteink X4 Pro：99美元4.3英寸触屏电子阅读器，支持CrossPoint Reader开源固件
items.summary_zh: Xteink X4 Pro售价99美元，搭载4.3英寸触屏E Ink显示屏（219 PPI）、16GB microSD卡、1100mAh电池，支持2.4GHz WiFi 4和蓝牙。此前型号基于ESP32-C3 RISC-V微控制器，新款据GitHub信息改用性能更强的ESP32-S3，并支持开源固件CrossPoint Reader。
items.why_it_matters_zh: ESP32-S3基于RISC-V内核，结合开源固件，为开发者提供高可玩性的便携电子阅读平台。

items.title: nRF54L Arduino Core project brings Arduino support to Nordic Semi nRF54L wireless SoCs
items.summary: nRF54L Arduino Core is an open-source project designed to bring Arduino support for Nordic Semiconductor nRF54L wireless SoCs, starting with Seeed Studio’s XIAO nRF54L15 (Sense) and XIAO nRF54LM20A (Sense) boards, as well as compatible Holyiot nRF54L15 modules. Since the launch of the nRF52840-based Arduino Nano 33 BLE board in 2019, Nordic nRF52 wireless microcontrollers have been officially supported by the Arduino IDE. However, it’s not quite the case for the newer nRF54L Cortex-M33 microcontrollers. Lolren has decided to change that with the unofficial nRF54 Arduino core project. nRF54L Arduino Core highlights: Dual-core access – Use the 128 MHz Cortex-M33 application CPU and the VPR RISC-V coprocessor without adopting a vendor RTOS Wireless Bluetooth LE support – Peripheral, central, dual-role, GATT server/client, HID, BLE UART, PHY/DLE/MTU control, LE Secure Connections, bonding, OOB, Numeric Comparison, privacy/RPA, and CSRK signed writes Experimental support for Zigbee – Partial stack and device demonstrations; incomplete Zigbee [...] The post nRF54L Arduino Core project brings Arduino support to Nordic Semi nRF54L wireless SoCs appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: nRF54L Arduino Core项目为Nordic nRF54L无线SoC带来Arduino支持
items.summary_zh: nRF54L Arduino Core为开源项目，为Nordic Semiconductor nRF54L无线SoC带来非官方Arduino支持，适配Seeed Studio XIAO nRF54L15（Sense）和nRF54LM20A等开发板。项目支持双核调用，可同时使用128MHz Cortex-M33应用核与VPR RISC-V协处理器，并提供完整BLE功能。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 填补nRF54L系列Arduino支持空白，开发者可便捷利用RISC-V协处理器扩展功能。

items.title: reCamera Pro “Open AI Camera” supports computer vision, LLM, VLM, STT, and TTS workloads
items.summary: Seeed Studio’s reCamera Pro is an AI camera powered by a Rockchip RV1126B quad-core Cortex-A53 SoC with a 3 TOPS NPU for on-device AI vision, but also large language models (LLMs), vision language models (VLMs), as well as speech-to-text (STT) and text-to-speech (TTS) with built-in audio capabilities. It offers a powerful update to the earlier reCamera modular AI camera based on an SG2002 RISC-V AI SoC, with up to 4GB RAM, 16GB eMMC flash, an 8MP camera sensor supporting up to 4K @ 30 FPS, an M12 lens mount, a built-in 1W speaker, two microphones, Gigabit Ethernet with PoE, dual-band WiFi 5 connectivity, a USB-C port for power and data, and and expansion through a GPIO and MIPI DSI connectors. reCamera Pro specifications: SoC – Rockchip RV1126B CPU – Quad-core Arm Cortex-A53 up to 1.2 GHz with 32KB L1 I-Cache and 32KB L1 D-Cache, unified 512KB L2 Cache MCU – [...] The post reCamera Pro “Open AI Camera” supports computer vision, LLM, VLM, STT, and TTS workloads appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

It offers a powerful update to the earlier reCamera modular AI camera based on an SG2002 RISC-V AI SoC, with up to 4GB RAM, 16GB eMMC flash, an 8MP camera sensor supporting up to 4K @ 30 FPS, an M12 lens mount, a built-in 1W speaker, two microphones, Gigabit Ethernet with PoE, dual-band WiFi 5 connectivity, a USB-C port for power and data, and and expansion through a GPIO and MIPI DSI connectors. reCamera Pro specifications: SoC – Rockchip RV1126B CPU – Quad-core Arm Cortex-A53 up to 1.2 GHz with 32KB L1 I-Cache and 32KB L1 D-Cache, unified 512KB L2 Cache MCU – [...] The post reCamera Pro “Open AI Camera” supports computer vision, LLM, VLM, STT, and TTS workloads appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

items.title: $50 Forgix board pairs Raspberry Pi RP2354 MCU with Trion T8 FPGA in Teensy form factor
items.summary: Adiuvo Engineering’s Forgix is a development board pairing a Raspberry Pi RP2354 microcontroller with 2MB flash and an Efinix Trion T8 FPGA in the Teensy 4.0 form factor. The board also features a 16 Mbit PSRAM chip, a USB-C port, a push-button, an RGB LED, and through and castellated holes routed to either the RP2354 MCU or Trion T8 FPGA for SPI, I2C, UART, ADC, USB 1.1, and custom interfaces. Forgix board specifications: SoC – Raspberry Pi RP2354B CPU Dual-core Arm Cortex-M33 @ 150 MHz with Arm Trustzone, Secure boot Dual-core 32-bit RISC-V Hazard3 @ 150 MHz (3-stage in-order pipeline; RV32IMAC with Zba, Zbb, Zbs, Zbkb, Zcb, Zcmp, and Zicsr extensions) Up to two cores can be used at a time, either 2x Arm, 2x RISC-V, or 1x Arm + 1x RISC-V Memory – 520 KB on-chip SRAM Storage – 2MB of stacked (in-package) flash memory FPGA – Efinix Trion T8F49 connected to [...] The post $50 Forgix board pairs Raspberry Pi RP2354 MCU with Trion T8 FPGA in Teensy form factor appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

items.title: LLVM 23.1-rc1 Released With AMD Zen 6 & AVX-512 BMM Support, Other Compiler Enhancements
items.summary: Following the recent code branching for the LLVM 23 series, LLVM 23.1-rc1 was released today in working toward the next stable release of this open-source compiler stack...
items.title_zh: LLVM 23.1-rc1 发布，新增 AMD Zen 6 与 AVX-512 BMM 支持
items.summary_zh: LLVM 23.1-rc1 作为 LLVM 23 系列首个候选版本正式发布，新增对 AMD Zen 6 和 AVX-512 BFM 的支持，并带来多项编译器改进，向稳定版 LLVM 23.1 迈进。
items.why_it_matters_zh: LLVM 是 RISC-V 生态的核心编译器之一，新版本通常会同步优化 RISC-V 后端与指令支持。

items.title: Qualcomm Posts Linux Patches For X2 Elite Extreme Powered ASUS Zenbook A16
items.summary: Following recent Linux kernel patches enabling the Snapdragon X2 Elite powered Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x Gen11 and HP EliteBook X G2q X2 Elite laptops to boot outside of Windows 11 on ARM, Qualcomm engineers have now posted a new patch series for getting the X2 Elite Extreme powered ASUS Zenbook A16 working on Linux...
items.title_zh: 高通发布Linux补丁以支持搭载X2 Elite Extreme的华硕Zenbook A16
items.summary_zh: 继近期Linux内核补丁使搭载骁龙X2 Elite的联想Yoga Slim 7x和HP EliteBook笔记本能在Windows 11 ARM之外启动后，高通工程师又发布了新补丁系列，让搭载X2 Elite Extreme的华硕Zenbook A16能在Linux上运行。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 高通持续为ARM笔记本提供Linux内核支持，助力ARM PC生态摆脱对Windows的依赖。

items.title: AMD Getting The Linux Kernel Ready For Zen 6 Profiling/Perf With More EILVT Registers
items.summary: Among the recent patch series in preparing Linux for upcoming AMD Zen 6 processors is making the kernel aware of additional EILVT registers to be found with at least EPYC Venice platforms...
items.title_zh: AMD为Linux内核添加更多EILVT寄存器以支持Zen 6性能剖析
items.summary_zh: 在为即将推出的AMD Zen 6处理器准备Linux内核的近期补丁系列中，包括让内核识别EPYC Venice平台新增的EILVT寄存器，以便支持更精确的性能剖析功能。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 提前为Zen 6服务器平台提供内核级性能监控支持，确保EPYC Venice上市时Linux环境完备。

items.title: Linux Patches Introduce "KNOD" For In-Kernel Network Offloading Directly To AMD GPUs
items.summary: Some extremely cool patches were posted to the Linux kernel mailing list on Sunday. The patches for "KNOD" allow for in-kernel network offloading to GPUs with an initial focus on AMD GPU support. What makes this all the more nifty is that it doesn't depend upon any user-space libraries like AMD ROCm but is all handled in-kernel with driving the GPU directly...
items.title_zh: Linux 内核引入 KNOD，直接将网络流量卸载到 AMD GPU
items.summary_zh: Linux 内核邮件列表发布名为 KNOD 的补丁，允许在内核内将网络流量直接卸载到 GPU，初期聚焦 AMD GPU 设备。该方案不依赖 AMD ROCm 等用户空间库，所有工作均由内核直接驱动 GPU 完成。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 在内核层完成网络卸载，无需用户空间库介入，可显著提升 GPU 网络数据处理效率。

items.title: AMD Posts AVX10_V2_AUX ISA Support Patches For GCC Compiler
items.summary: Earlier this month Intel compiler engineers posted initial GCC compiler patches for the AI Compute Extensions "ACE" that was born out of the x86 Ecosystem Advisory Group to augment AVX and scalar code with new capabilities for AI/ML workloads. Now as part of that an AMD compiler engineer posted patches over the weekend for AVX10_V2_AUX ISA support...
items.title_zh: AMD 在 GCC 编译器中提交 AVX10_V2_AUX ISA 支持补丁
items.summary_zh: 继 Intel 工程师发布 AI 计算扩展 ACE 的 GCC 补丁后，AMD 工程师跟进提交了 AVX10_V2_AUX ISA 支持补丁。该工作源自 x86 生态系统咨询组，旨在为 AVX 与标量代码增添 AI/ML 负载处理能力。
items.why_it_matters_zh: AMD 积极跟进 x86 生态合作，推动 AVX10 在 AI/ML 计算场景中的落地应用。

items.title: Meet Moddo Pinch – The world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board (2026 Edition)
items.summary: Canada-based Moddo has designed the Pinch board, which it claims is the world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board so far, measuring just 10.9 x 10.5 mm. The board is powered by a Microchip SAMD11 Cortex-M0+ microcontroller with 4 KB SRAM and 16KB flash, features an RGB LED, reset/bootloader button, 3.3 V LDO, a USB-C port, and a total of 12 GPIOs. Moddo Pinch specifications: Microcontroller – Microchip SAM D11 (ATSAMD11D14A) MCU core – Arm Cortex-M0+ processor running at up to 48 MHz RAM – 4 KB SRAM Storage – 16 KB Flash (12 KB for sketches, 4 KB bootloader) USB – 1x USB Type-C port for power, programming (CDC serial), and HID Expansion – 16-pin header (1.27mm pitch) 12x GPIO (D0–D11) 5x analog input (A0–A4) 11x PWM 1x DAC 1x I2C, 1x SPI, 2x UART(multiplexed with USB & D5/D6) Debug – SWD on D5 (SWCLK) and D6 (SWDIO) Misc RGB LED [...] The post Meet Moddo Pinch – The world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board (2026 Edition) appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: Meet Moddo Pinch – The world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board (2026 Edition)
items.summary_zh: Canada-based Moddo has designed the Pinch board, which it claims is the world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board so far, measuring just 10.9 x 10.5 mm. The board is powered by a Microchip SAMD11 Cortex-M0+ microcontroller with 4 KB SRAM and 16KB flash, features an RGB LED, reset/bootloader button, 3.3 V LDO, a USB-C port, and a total of 12 GPIOs. Moddo Pinch specifications: Microcontroller – Microchip SAM D11 (ATSAMD11D14A) MCU core – Arm Cortex-M0+ processor running at up to 48 MHz RAM – 4 KB SRAM Storage – 16 KB Flash (12 KB for sketches, 4 KB bootloader) USB – 1x USB Type-C port for power, programming (CDC serial), and HID Expansion – 16-pin header (1.27mm pitch) 12x GPIO (D0–D11) 5x analog input (A0–A4) 11x PWM 1x DAC 1x I2C, 1x SPI, 2x UART(multiplexed with USB & D5/D6) Debug – SWD on D5 (SWCLK) and D6 (SWDIO) Misc RGB LED [...] The post Meet Moddo Pinch – The world’s smallest 32-bit Arduino-compatible board (2026 Edition) appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.why_it_matters_zh: 等待中文编辑摘要。

items.title: Raspberry Pi gets 10BASE-T1S/T1L Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) HAT+ board
items.summary: Germany-based Brechel Electronic has launched two new Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) expansion boards for Raspberry Pi platforms: the BE-IIS-HPP-T1S and the BE-IIS-HPP-T1L. Designed for technology evaluation, industrial network prototyping, and educational laboratory use, these boards add 10 Mbit/s Ethernet communication over a single twisted pair to standard Raspberry Pi SBCs. The BE-IIS-HPP-T1S is based on the Microchip LAN8651 10BASE-T1S MAC-PHY and supports IEEE 802.3cg Single Pair Ethernet over multidrop networks with up to 8 nodes, enabling distances up to 25 meters on a shared bus. For longer-reach point-to-point links, the company offers the BE-IIS-HPP-T1L, built around Analog Devices ADIN1110 MAC-PHY. Both boards are part of the BE-IIS HAT++ ecosystem, which allows multiple industrial communication HATs to be stacked on a single Raspberry Pi without running into SPI or GPIO resource conflicts. Brechel Electronic 10BASE-T1L and 10BASE-T1S specifications: Compatibility – Raspberry Pi HAT+ compliant T1L – Supports Pi 3, 4, 5, and Zero [...] The post Raspberry Pi gets 10BASE-T1S/T1L Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) HAT+ board appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .

For longer-reach point-to-point links, the company offers the BE-IIS-HPP-T1L, built around Analog Devices ADIN1110 MAC-PHY. Both boards are part of the BE-IIS HAT++ ecosystem, which allows multiple industrial communication HATs to be stacked on a single Raspberry Pi without running into SPI or GPIO resource conflicts. Brechel Electronic 10BASE-T1L and 10BASE-T1S specifications: Compatibility – Raspberry Pi HAT+ compliant T1L – Supports Pi 3, 4, 5, and Zero [...] The post Raspberry Pi gets 10BASE-T1S/T1L Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) HAT+ board appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.why_it_matters_zh: 等待中文编辑摘要。

items.title: AIS-1000 AI Surveillance Station – A $3,640 NDAA and TAA-compliant AI box based on Raspberry Pi 5 and Hailo-8L
items.summary: If you feel like a cheapskate when purchasing a Raspberry Pi 5 16GB for only $305, there’s now a solution to avoid embarrassment. Meet the $3,640 AIS-1000 AI Surveillance Station, pairing a Raspberry Pi 5 with a Hailo-8L AI accelerator and a 1TB NVMe SSD, all housed in a metal enclosure. Jokes aside, the device from Planet Technology is real, and users mostly pay for NDAA (National Defense Authorization Act) and TAA (Trade Agreements Act) compliance for use in AI-enhanced surveillance applications for government, critical infrastructure, or other high-security applications. Planet AIS-1000 hardware specifications: SBC – Raspberry Pi 5 (only advertised features listed) SoC – Broadcom BCM2712 CPU – Quad-core Arm Cortex-A76 processor @ 2.4 GHz GPU – VideoCore VII GPU @ 800 MHz with support for OpenGL ES 3.1, Vulkan 1.2, 4Kp60 HEVC decoder System Memory – 8GB LPDDR4X-4267 SDRAM Networking – Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port via Broadcom BCM54213PE transceiver [...] The post AIS-1000 AI Surveillance Station – A $3,640 NDAA and TAA-compliant AI box based on Raspberry Pi 5 and Hailo-8L appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: Planet AIS-1000 AI监控站：基于Raspberry Pi 5与Hailo-8L，售价3,640美元
items.summary_zh: Planet Technology推出AIS-1000 AI监控站，内部搭载Raspberry Pi 5和Hailo-8L AI加速器，配备1TB NVMe SSD与全金属外壳。该设备通过NDAA与TAA合规认证，主要面向政府、关键基础设施等高安全性AI监控应用。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 售价远超BOM成本，溢价来自NDAA与TAA合规认证，瞄准政府与高安全市场。

items.title: Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 – A Raspberry Pi CM5-compatible Rockchip RK3576 AI Compute Module with WiFi 6, Bluetooth 5.3
items.summary: Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 is a Rockchip RK3576 octa-core Arm Cortex-A72/A53 system-on-module based on the Raspberry Pi CM4/CM5 form factor with up to 16GB LPDDR5 and 128GB eMMC flash. The module also features a RealTek RTL8211F Gigabit Ethernet controller, an Ampak AP6275S wireless module for dual-band WiFi 6 and Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity, and a Rockchip RK806S-5 PMIC for power management. It features two 100-pin B2B connectors, allowing it to be plugged into carrier boards designed for the Raspberry Pi CM4/CM5, with some limitations as we’ll see further below. Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 specifications SoC – Rockchip RK3576 Octa-core CPU – 4x Cortex-A72 cores at 2.2GHz, 4x Cortex-A53 cores at 1.8GHz GPU – Arm Mali-G52 MC3 GPU at 1 GHz with support for OpenGL ES 3.2, OpenCL 2.0, and Vulkan 1.1 NPU – 6 TOPS (INT8) AI accelerator with support for INT4/INT8/INT16/BF16/TF32 mixed operations. VPU Video Decoder – H.264, H.265, VP9, AV1, and AVS2 up to [...] The post Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 – A Raspberry Pi CM5-compatible Rockchip RK3576 AI Compute Module with WiFi 6, Bluetooth 5.3 appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5：兼容Raspberry Pi CM5的Rockchip RK3576算力模块
items.summary_zh: Geniatech推出XPI-3576-CM5系统模块，采用Rockchip RK3576八核Arm处理器与CM4/CM5规格，支持最高16GB LPDDR5与128GB eMMC。集成RTL8211F千兆以太网、AP6275S WiFi 6与蓝牙5.3，配备6 TOPS NPU，可接入现有载板。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 为Raspberry Pi CM4/CM5生态提供Rockchip RK3576替代选项，集成WiFi 6与6 TOPS NPU算力。

items.title: Bigme Hibreak Dual 2 – An Android 16 smartphone with 6.13-inch 80fps E-Ink and 5-inch LCD display (Crowdfunding)
items.summary: Bigme has launched the Hibreak Dual 2, an Android 16 smartphone with a 6.13-inch 80fps E-Ink display on the front and a 5-inch LCD on the rear. Built around the MediaTek Dimensity 8300 processor and supports dual 5G connectivity, positioning it as an E-Ink smartphone with flagship-class hardware. The front E-Ink can be used for reading, writing, and general everyday use, whereas the LCD in the back serves as a conventional smartphone display for applications that require higher refresh rates and full-color output, like video gaming and navigation. This dual-screen setup allows users to switch between the two displays depending on the task. Bigme Hibreak Dual 2 specifications: SoC – MediaTek Dimensity 8300 CPU – Octa-core processor with 4x Arm Cortex-A715 and 4x Cortex-A510 GPU – Arm Mali-G615 VPU Video Encoding – H.264, HEVC Video Playback – H.264, HEVC, VP9, AV1 AI accelerator – MediaTek NPU 780 Memory – 12GB [...] The post Bigme Hibreak Dual 2 – An Android 16 smartphone with 6.13-inch 80fps E-Ink and 5-inch LCD display (Crowdfunding) appeared first on CNX Software - Embedded Systems News .
items.title_zh: Bigme Hibreak Dual 2众筹：6.13英寸E-Ink与5英寸LCD双屏手机
items.summary_zh: Bigme推出Hibreak Dual 2安卓16智能手机，正面配备6.13英寸80fps E-Ink屏幕，背面配备5英寸LCD屏幕。搭载联发科天玑8300处理器，支持双卡5G连接。用户可根据任务在E-Ink（阅读写作）和LCD（视频游戏、导航）之间切换，兼顾护眼阅读与全彩应用。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 双屏设计将E-Ink护眼与LCD全彩显示结合，旗舰处理器赋予电子墨水手机强大性能，拓展了E-Ink设备的使用场景。
